title: Clean Up Old Programs
ticket: Mike installed too many random apps. His computer is slow.
clue: He doesn't know how to uninstall programs.
tooltip: Apps & Features lets you remove programs.
careerConnection: Help Desk cleans up machines constantly.

interactiveDemo.prompt: Where should you remove unwanted programs?
interactiveDemo.hint: Windows already has a place to remove apps safely.

breakFixTask: Uninstaller missing. Remove leftover folder manually.
explainQuestions: How do you remove programs safely?
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without hints?

translationTerms.plain: Remove a program from the computer.
translationTerms.why: Unused apps can cause clutter or slowdowns.
